title: Gormania spathulifolia
taxonomy: Gormania spathulifolia is a species of flowering plant in the family Commelinaceae. This plant is commonly found in tropical regions, and its classification places it within the order Commelinales. It is closely related to other plants in the Commelinaceae family, such as the wandering Jew and the spiderwort. The exact classification of Gormania spathulifolia can also be represented using the binomial nomenclature of its genus and species, which is used universally in botanical classification. Further research may be necessary to determine the full taxonomic classification of this plant.
